title: Red Hat Security Advisory: RHTAS - Tech Preview Release Of the Policy Controller Operator
overview:
The Tech Preview release of the RHTAS Policy Controller Operator.
For more details please visit the product documentation at https://access.redhat.com/documentation/en-us/red_hat_trusted_artifact_signer/1.3
description: The RHTAS Policy Controller Operator can be used with OpenShift Container Platform 4.16, 4.17, 4.18, 4.19, 4.20, 4.21
full_text:
The Tech Preview release of the RHTAS Policy Controller Operator.
For more details please visit the product documentation at https://access.redhat.com/documentation/en-us/red_hat_trusted_artifact_signer/1.3

The RHTAS Policy Controller Operator can be used with OpenShift Container Platform 4.16, 4.17, 4.18, 4.19, 4.20, 4.21
